title: 12 Pcs Pink Heart Balloons, 18 Inch Large Foil Heart Balloons, Helium Birthday Party Decorations for Girls Women Birthday Wedding Baby Shower Valentines
features: Premium Quality: Crafted from high-grade aluminum foil, these baby pink heart balloons are durable and resistant to deformation, ensuring they maintain their romantic heart shape throughout your event. The reusable feature adds value, making them perfect for multiple celebrations

Versatile Use: Ideal for various occasions such as birthdays, weddings, baby showers, and Valentine's Day. The elegant baby pink color and heart shape make them a charming addition to any party decor, suitable for both girls and women

Easy Inflation: These balloons can be inflated with either helium or air and feature a self-sealing design for convenience. It is recommended to inflate to 85%-90% capacity to prevent bursting and ensure optimal appearance
Complete Set: Each package includes 12 heart-shaped balloons, a ribbon, and a sticker, providing you need for a festive setup. The lightweight design makes them easy to transport and arrange

Easy To Use: The balloons are reusable, and deflation is simple with just a plastic straw, making cleanup effortless after your event. They are ideal for balloon bouquets, home and table decor, wedding aisle decoration, photo backgrounds, party supplies, and other events
description: Product description Specification: Size: 47x42 cm/18.5x16.54 in (Uninflated), 45 cm/17.72 in (Inflated) Color: Baby Pink Material: Aluminum Film Packing List: 12 Pcs 18 Inch Baby Pink Heart Balloons 1 Pcs Ribbon 1 Pcs Sticker Safety Warning no
